questionHtml:
The diagram shows a ribosome and associated mRNA

 

Which of these events occurs first in translation?

A.  Small ribosomal subunit binds to mRNA.

B.  Large ribosomal subunit binds to mRNA.

C.  Initiator tRNA enters E site.

D.  Initiator tRNA enters A site.

meta.title: The diagram shows a ribosome and associated mRNA Which of these events occurs first in translation? A. Small ribosomal subunit binds to mRNA. B. Large ribosomal subunit binds to mR
